title: Pan-Seared Dumplings with Sugar Glaze
description: A sweet and savory Japanese-inspired dish featuring pan-seared dumplings smothered in a sticky sugar glaze.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add dumplings, leaving space between each piece, and cook until the bottoms are golden brown.
Flip dumplings and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a small saucepan, combine cozy sugar and 1 tablespoon of water over medium heat.
Bring the sugar mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Brush the sugar glaze over the cooked dumplings and serve immediately.
